name: tiktok-mirror
description: Self-hosted TikTok mirror: follow profiles, cache metadata daily, lazy-download videos on first watch. Uses yt-dlp under the hood.

envVars.name: TIKTOK_ROOT
envVars.description: Host directory where downloaded TikTok videos are cached

envVars.name: SYNC_TOKEN
envVars.description: Shared secret used by the daily sync cron to authenticate

postInstall: 2. Install yt-dlp on the host (already in the Docker image if you use the Elite Dockerfile)
3. Mount a host volume at TIKTOK_ROOT
5. Optional: install deploy/cron/tiktok-sync as a daily cron to refresh metadata
